paragraphs: Program Coordinator and Lecturer in Artificial Intelligence at MAHSA University with expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Digital Technologies, and Applied Machine Learning. Over eight years of academic and industry experience spanning higher education teaching, curriculum development, accreditation support, postgraduate supervision, and interdisciplinary AI research.

My academic work integrates technology innovation with practical industry applications including healthcare AI, intelligent systems, computer vision, optimization algorithms, and digital transformation initiatives. I have established a strong research profile with publications in high-impact Q1/Q2 journals, more than 2,200 citations, and active collaborations with industry and research institutions.
I am committed to student-centred education, industry-engaged learning, and research-led teaching aligned with international higher education standards.

education.thesis: Optimization of Pix2pix GANs via Gradient Penalty Sine Cosine Algorithm
Enhanced Weight Optimized RNN Based on Sine Cosine Algorithm
Computer Network and Security - CGPA 3.10/4 (2nd Upper)
Cloud Architecture, DevOps, Security, AI/ML on AWS

custom_sections.title: Academic Leadership & Quality Assurance
custom_sections.content:
• Program coordination
  • MQA/MQF compliance
  • Curriculum mapping
  • CLO/PLO alignment
  • Assessment moderation
  • Continuous Quality Improvement (CQI)
  • Accreditation preparation
  • Student advising
  • Timetable coordination
  • Teaching allocation

experience.title: Program Coordinator: Information Technology
duties: Coordinate academic and administrative operations of the IT program
Oversee curriculum planning, course mapping, and syllabus alignment with MQF and accreditation standards
Coordinate course offerings, teaching assignments, and semester scheduling
Liaise with faculty members, Dean/Deputy, and university management on program matters
Monitor course delivery quality and learning outcomes achievement
Support accreditation, audit, and quality assurance documentation
Handle student academic issues, progression matters, and program-level advising
Review and improve assessment methods and moderation processes
Assist in strategic planning and continuous improvement initiatives for the IT program

experience.title: Lecturer in Artificial Intelligence
duties: IT Lecturer, Faculty of Engineering, Built Environment and Information Technology, MAHSA University

Teach undergraduate courses: Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Wireless Communication, IT Fundamentals, Operating Systems, DBMS, Information Management, Information System, Introduction to Programming, OOP, and Computer Architecture & Organization
Design, prepare, and update lecture materials, tutorials, assignments, and assessments
Design, prepare, and teach Standalone Micro Credential Programs
Supervise PhD students, co-supervise PhD students, co-supervisor postdoctoral projects, and supervise FYP students
Conduct lectures, tutorials, and practical sessions using active and student-centered learning approaches
Evaluate student performance through continuous assessment and final examinations
Participate in curriculum development and course review
Engage in academic research and publish findings in peer-reviewed journals and conferences
Provide academic advising and mentoring to students
Support institutional activities, accreditation, and quality assurance processes

experience.title: Outcome-Based Education (OBE) / Malaysian Qualifications Framework (MQF) Expert Assessor
duties: a) Programme Rationale and Objectives
b) Programme Learning Outcomes (aligned with MQF Level 8)
c) Curriculum Design and Structure
d) Delivery Methods for ODL, including Self-Instructional Materials (SIM)
e) Assessment Strategies suitable for remote learning
f) Academic and Learner Support Services
g) Facilities and Learning Resources for online learners
h) Quality Assurance and Programme Monitoring Mechanisms

experience.title: Lecturer of Computer Science  (Part Time)
duties: Plan, prepare and conduct C++ and Java lectures

Undergraduate lab demonstration and CS lecturing
Supervised and mentored Bachelor's degree students
Facilitated hands-on technical workshops and labs

Communicating with port departments and providing comprehensive logistical support

duties: Installing RFID devices, configuring routers, and troubleshooting gantry problems
Requirements gathering, development planning, designing, workshops, documentation, and MySQL database maintenance
Promote company products and services and convince customers to sign contracts

research_projects.title: Collaborative AI research initiative with Malaysian Nuclear Agency involving deep learning-based material classification for intelligent scanning systems
research_projects.description: Deep learning framework for nuclear scanning equipment: material classification (gas, liquid, air, solid). Collaboration with the Malaysian Nuclear Agency.

research_projects.title: Deep Learning Teeth Age Prediction from Dental Radiographs
research_projects.description: AI model for biological age estimation from dental X-rays. Cross-faculty collaboration with MAHSA Medic (IT & Dentistry).

research_projects.title: FOEBEIT Academic Planner
research_projects.description: Timetable Generation and Human Resource Planning System for the Faculty of Engineering, Built Environment and IT :MAHSA University.

research_projects.title: ConfTrack Malaysia Conference Management System
research_projects.description:
Full-lifecycle platform: paper submission, blind peer review, editorial decisions, QR attendance, badges, and digital certificates. Hosting MISEBEIT 2026. 
www.conftrack.com

research_projects.title: Autonomous Underwater Defect Detection
research_projects.description: CNN-based detection of structural defects (corrosion, cracks, biofilm) in offshore oil & gas platforms. Collaboration with UTP.

research_projects.description: Solution and decision making for onshore facilities: UTP.

research_projects.title: Assessment of Structural Steel Riser-Guard Load Capacities
research_projects.description: Resultant impact assessment on offshore structures loading: UTP.
